MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Erika N. Kavicky of The Bickel Law Firm Inc. (619.374.4100) appears telephnically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, John W. Meyers of Beatty & Myers LLP (562.606.1530) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

Court takes time to read and consider electronic copies of plaintiff's papers as no courtesy copies were submitted. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification as to amount of Attorney fees and costs.

PLAINTIFF CLEVELAND DANIELS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is granted in large part. Mr. Daniels is awarded fees and costs in the total sum of $28,829.74. The fees are calculated as set forth on the record. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
